name: PlacingDistanceAttributes
summary: The PlacingDistanceAttributes class contains the basic attributes for placing distances.

constructors.name: PlacingDistanceAttributes
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of the PlacingDistanceAttributes class. The default values are a 0.0 search margin and a 0.0 minimal distance.

constructors.name: PlacingDistanceAttributes
constructors.summary: Creates a new placing distance attributes instance with the given search marginal and minimal distance.

params.name: searchMargin
params.doc: The search marginal to be used.

params.name: minimalDistance
params.doc: The minimal distance to be used.

constructors.name: PlacingDistanceAttributes
constructors.signature: public PlacingDistanceAttributes(double searchMargin, double minimalDistance, double maximalDistance)
constructors.summary: Creates a new placing distance attributes instance with the given search margin, minimal and maximal distance.

params.name: searchMargin
params.doc: The search margin to be used.

params.name: minimalDistance
params.doc: The minimal distance to be used.

params.name: maximalDistance
params.doc: The maximal distance to be used.

methods.name: Clone
methods.summary: Creates a new object that is a copy of the current instance.

returns.doc: A new object that is a copy of the current instance.

methods.name: IsEqual
methods.summary: Compares the current object with an object of the same type.

params.name: ObjectToCompare
params.doc: The object to be used for comparing.

returns.doc: True if all the fields (except for the database GUID) of the objects match.

properties.name: MaximalDistance
properties.summary: Gets or sets the maximal distance for placing.

properties.name: MinimalDistance
properties.summary: Gets or sets the minimal distance for placing.

properties.name: SearchMargin
properties.summary: Gets or sets the search marginal for placing.
